content.claim: Church-maintained and minority self-government schools operating these tracks sit outside the Klebelsberg Centre's direct authority; any national reform of admissions criteria, curriculum, or capacity would require separate negotiation with non-state maintainers, not ministerial decree alone.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: The scope of church-maintained selective gimnáziums as a proportion of the sector is not quantified in the notes
This governance constraint applies only to institutional operating rules, not to funding or regulatory oversight the state retains
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
